decision: sliding window as TokenWindow class holding list[(ts,tokens)], prune-on-access
reasoning: exact per-call expiry makes sleep math correct; O(n) prune is free at single-operator sequential scale

decision: sleep_if_needed loops: while sum>=budget sleep until oldest entry expires, re-prune, re-check
reasoning: correct for any budget/entry-size mix; best-effort, single item over budget still makes one call
rejected: sleep a flat window_seconds (over-sleeps, stalls run RF-2)

reasoning: deterministic fast tests without wall-clock waits; mirrors existing completion= injection (A-C8); existing AC-4-010 test now retries so needs no-op sleep

decision: append exact string 'Trả lời bằng tiếng Việt.' to system_content in _build_messages
reasoning: static instruction not item data so RF-1 title+body egress unchanged; system placement keeps RF-1 assertion clean
rejected: append to user message content block

decision: _call_with_retry wraps _completion, catches only RateLimitError, wait=max(Retry-After,exp-backoff), re-raise after max_retries into unchanged summarize_items skip-log-continue
reasoning: smallest diff; preserves AC-4-011/012 batch behavior; non-429 errors skip immediately as today; Retry-After extracted defensively (litellm may omit .response)
rejected: move all error handling into a new retry+skip layer (rewrites working batch loop)

decision: added tokens_per_minute=6000, throttle_window_seconds=60.0, max_retries=3, retry_backoff_base_seconds=1.0 to SummarizerConfig frozen dataclass
reasoning: follows design.md §Implementation Guide exactly; all fields have spec-required defaults

decision: injected sleep=time.sleep, clock=time.monotonic into __init__; TokenWindow class in client.py with record/prune/sleep_if_needed; window is adapter instance state
reasoning: mirrors existing completion= injection pattern (ADR-003); per-batch scope achieved by instantiating in __init__ (ADR-001/002)

decision: appended exact string 'Trả lời bằng tiếng Việt.' to system_content in _build_messages as single concatenated string
reasoning: ADR-004; static instruction in system role preserves RF-1 (user message still title+body only)

decision: _call_with_retry loops with attempt counter; re-raises RateLimitError after max_retries into unchanged summarize_items except openai.APIError block; Retry-After extracted via getattr chain
reasoning: ADR-005: smallest diff, preserves AC-4-011/012; non-429 errors propagate immediately unchanged

decision: _summarizer helper extended with optional sleep/clock kwargs using **{} unpacking to keep existing call sites unchanged
reasoning: avoids changing every existing test that doesn't need sleep/clock; only new tests pass them
rejected: default=lambda _: None in all tests (would hide real time.sleep bugs in existing tests)

decision: GO — 0 bugs found; all 10 ACs independently verified; 619 tests pass; 98.8% coverage; 0 HIGH/CRITICAL vulnerabilities
reasoning: 5 targeted checks (Vietnamese prompt, sleep/no-sleep, retry-3x+Retry-After+exhaustion, usage=None→0, cache-not-counted) all pass via code trace + assertion review. No hollow assertions. No security findings. Dep audit clean.
